name: metroai-uncertainty
description: World's first measurement uncertainty MCP server. GUM-based uncertainty calculation, Monte Carlo validation, and reverse uncertainty engineering for ISO 17025 / KOLAS laboratories.
author: Yongbeom Kim

tools.name: calculate_uncertainty
tools.description: Calculate measurement uncertainty using GUM (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3). Supports gauge block, mass, temperature, pressure, and DC voltage calibration templates. Returns uncertainty budget table with combined uncertainty, expanded uncertainty, coverage factor, and component breakdown.

parameters.template: Calibration field: gauge_block, mass, temperature, pressure, dc_voltage
parameters.std_cert_U: Standard's expanded uncertainty from calibration certificate

tools.name: pt_analysis
tools.description: Proficiency Testing analysis — automatically judge z-score, En number, and zeta-score per ISO 13528 / ISO 17043. Input your lab value and assigned value to get instant pass/fail judgment.

parameters.sigma_pt: Standard deviation for proficiency assessment (for z-score)
